videoSnippet.title: Moment of Truth || Magnus vs Alireza || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Firouzja, Alireza (2759) 
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [11] 2026.05.31
C77 Ruy Lopez, four knights (Tarrasch) variation

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.Nc3 Be7 6.O-O b5 7.Bb3 O-O 8.d3 d6 9.a3 Na5 10.Ba2 Be6 11.Bxe6 fxe6 12.b4 Nc6 13.Bd2 Qe8 14.Ne2 Nh5 15.c3 Qg6 16.Ng3 Nf4 17.a4 Qf7 18.d4 g5 19.axb5 axb5 20.Rxa8 Rxa8 21.dxe5 dxe5 22.Bxf4 exf4 23.Qd7 fxg3 24.Qxc6 gxf2+ 25.Kxf2 Rf8 26.Kg1 Bd6 27.Qxb5 g4 28.Nd2 Bf4 29.g3 Be3+ 30.Kg2 Qg7 31.Qd3 Bb6 32.Rxf8+ Qxf8 33.Qe2 h5 34.h3 Qg7 35.hxg4 hxg4 36.c4 c6 37.Nf1 Kf8 38.Nh2 Qc3 39.Nxg4 Qxb4 40.Ne5 Qd6 41.Qh5 Ke7 42.Qh7+ Ke8 43.Qg8+ Ke7 44.Qg7+ Ke8 45.Kh3 Bd4 46.Qh8+ Ke7 47.Nxc6+ Qxc6 48.Qxd4 Kf7 49.c5 Qb5 50.Kh4 Kg6 51.Qe5 Qc4 52.Qg5+ Kf7 53.Kh5 Qc3 54.e5 Qc2 55.Qf6+

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:52 Game Starts
02:15 Completely New Game!
08:30 IWITP
09:15 STANDINGS AFTER ROUND 6
10:15 Legends Of The Channel
